meaning: n.污仔病(蜜蜂幼虫的疫病)
examples: It contained an antibiotic used to treat "foulbrood", a disease that afflicts bee larvae.
Up to now, three kinds of bacterial diseases of honeybee larvae had been reported, including American foulbrood, European foulbrood and honeybee powdery-scale.
Plan Bee began in 2009 after Jersey bees were struck down with the American Foulbrood disease which caused the loss of one third of the island's bee population.
